creator: jdp@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The net/cvsup port contains statements which specify that it depends 
on the pm3 ports: 

BUILD_DEPENDS=  ${L1}libm3tcp${L2}:${PORTSDIR}/lang/pm3-net 
... 
BUILD_DEPENDS=  ${L1}libm3formsvbt${L2}:${PORTSDIR}/lang/pm3-forms 

These statements cause the necessary ports (including m3build) to 
be installed automatically.  They have not changed for a very long 
time, yet many people have installed this port successfully.  There 
must be something locally wrong on your system if this is not 
working correctly for you.  Perhaps you have NO_DEPENDS set in your 
environment or in your /etc/make.conf file.
